title: Boilermakers
description: Construct, assemble, maintain, and repair stationary steam boilers and boiler house auxiliaries. Align structures or plate sections to assemble boiler frame tanks or vats, following blueprints. Work involves use of hand and power tools, plumb bobs, levels, wedges, dogs, or turnbuckles. Assist in testing assembled vessels. Direct cleaning of boilers and boiler furnaces. Inspect and repair boiler fittings, such as safety valves, regulators, automatic-control mechanisms, water columns, and auxiliary machines.

tasks.text: Conduct pressure tests on vessels, such as boilers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study blueprints to determine locations, relationships, or dimensions of parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine boilers, pressure vessels, tanks, or vats to locate defects, such as leaks, weak spots, or defective sections, so that they can be repaired.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect assembled vessels or individual components, such as tubes, fittings, valves, controls, or auxiliary mechanisms, to locate any defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Lay out plate, sheet steel, or other heavy metal and locate and mark bending and cutting lines, using protractors, compasses, and drawing instruments or templates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bell, bead with power hammers, or weld pressure vessel tube ends to ensure leakproof joints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Locate and mark reference points for columns or plates on boiler foundations, following blueprints and using straightedges, squares, transits, or measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shape or fabricate parts, such as stacks, uptakes, or chutes, to adapt pressure vessels, heat exchangers, or piping to premises, using heavy-metalworking machines such as brakes, rolls, or drill presses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Position, align, and secure structural parts or related assemblies to boiler frames, tanks, or vats of pressure vessels, following blueprints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean pressure vessel equipment, using scrapers, wire brushes, and cleaning solvents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace defective pressure vessel parts, such as safety valves or regulators, using torches, jacks, caulking hammers, power saws, threading dies, welding equipment, or metalworking machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Attach rigging and signal crane or hoist operators to lift heavy frame and plate sections or other parts into place.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Straighten or reshape bent pressure vessel plates or structure parts, using hammers, jacks, or torches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Shape seams, joints, or irregular edges of pressure vessel sections or structural parts to attain specified fit of parts, using cutting torches, hammers, files, or metalworking machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Bolt or arc weld pressure vessel structures and parts together, using wrenches or welding equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install manholes, handholes, taps, tubes, valves, gauges, or feedwater connections in drums of water tube boilers, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble large vessels in an on-site fabrication shop prior to installation to ensure proper fit.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install refractory bricks or other heat-resistant materials in fireboxes of pressure vessels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
